candidate_llm_application_excerpt: detached vs frictional-rest LR controller; regulator state on slower clock, decoupled from instantaneous gradient noise; periodic escapement releases transfer setpoint to training LR

results.note: LLM-in-loop GD controller with static+dynamic channels, guardrails — overlaps controller-architecture framing but doesn't specifically use detached-vs-frictional analogy
Provably-tuned schedules; theoretical, no oscillator analogy
Linear decay because gradient noise dominates — partially aligned with gradient-noise insulation motivation but uses simple LR decay, not a detached regulator
